name: Scourge
description:
It was really about time I did Scourge.......

And I'm using a song for the event which I deem as Scourge's theme song in a way. I find it really menacing and I think it suits him! Lmk what you think in the reviews. Hope you enjoy!

(Note: There's still a lot about Scourge I don't know, so I left some of the annotations in from copying the information from the wiki to avoid spoilers.)

Tags: scourge, warrior cats, villain, evil, tigerstar, firestar, tigerclaw, fireheart, tiny, warriors, cat, killer, enemy, survival, rpg, fighting, adventure
creator: Ormtalari
